calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-18-2002 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Sep-03-2002 Failure To Post Jury Fees

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Sep-09-2002 Case Settled - Set For Crc 525 Hearing On Nov-19-02 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Default Prove-Up On Calendar In Scd 218 At 09:00 Am On September 9,2002.
Off Calendar Sep-09-2002 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Cause assigned to Dept. 218 for hearing on Default Prove-Up. Present: Commissioner Loretta M. Norris; P. Dias, Clerk: Susan Lee, CSR. Andrew Richard Kislik, Esq., represented Plaintiff TMV Group, Inc. The Court entered default against Tehin & Partners, et al. The following exhibits were presented for identification: A) Authorization & Agreement; B) Settlement Agreement; C) Order dated August 15,2002 - Involuntary-Inactive Enrollment; D)Web Page; E) Attorney Fees Summary and F) Gross Revenue Summary. Matter argued and submitted. The Coourt grants as follows: Principal: $308,800.00; Attorney fees: $40,000.00; Costs: 21,058.43 for a total judgment of $369,858.43. Request for punitive damages denied as the defendant was not served with Statement of Damages. Judgment signed in open court.
Notice Of Motion To Compel Deft Tehin + Partners For Sanctions Against Deft And Its Attorneys Pursuant To Ccp 2033, 2025 & 2031; Supporting Declaration And Memorandum
Motion To Compel Deft To Comply With The Document Request Served Upon It And To Produce Its Witnesses For Deposition And For Sanctions Against Deft And Its Attorneys

STATUS CONFERENCE
